name: Tofu Cheesecake Filling
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Fresh lemon juice (this is crucial)
1/4 cup Oil + 1/4 cup margarine, melted and cooled
1/4 cup Water or soymilk, if necessary
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend ingredients well in order, in a blender, until thick and creamy (add liquid at the end only if needed to blend tofu).
2. Pour into partially baked crumb crust and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until tofu is set in the middle.
3. Top with fruit or fruit syrups if desired. Makes 1 9-inch pie.
Crumb Crust
1. Mix dry ingredients.
2. Work in oil and margarine.
3. Work in water (should be crumbly).
4. Pat on the bottom and halfway up the sides of a 9-inch pie pan.
5. Partially bake for 10 minutes at 350°F (be careful, it can burn easily).
6. Fill and bake as above.
